# James Floyd

> Builder, creator, entrepreneur, intrapreneur, speaker, event producer, connector. Currently in New York City running The Sonder Series — 100 conversations with strangers.

## About

James Floyd is an entrepreneur and operator based in New York City. He has 7+ years of experience building lean teams, leading high-performance sales orgs, and serving as Chief of Staff to industry leaders. He operates at the intersection of people, ideas, and conviction — connecting, creating, and living with intention. He moves fast, leads well, and delivers consistently.

Website: https://jamesfloyds.world
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamesfloydl/
Instagram (content): https://www.instagram.com/jamesfloydscontent/
Instagram (personal): https://www.instagram.com/jamesfloydsworld/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@jamesfloydsworld
Twitter / X: https://twitter.com/jamesfloydsworld
Substack: https://jamesfloyd.substack.com
Email: jamesfloydbiz@gmail.com

## Current focus: The Sonder Series

The Sonder Series is James's ongoing creative project: 100 filmed conversations with strangers in New York City. He just moved to the city and wants to meet his neighbors. Train stations, stoops, benches, and couches — wherever someone seems open to being interrupted for a few honest minutes.

Every conversation is built around three core questions:
1. What's your story? (Hence "Sonder.")
2. What problem in the world means the most to you?
3. Who's the most impressive person you've ever met, and what made them impressive to you?

As of May 2026: 50 of 100 people interviewed across 41 episodes. Watch the series on YouTube at https://www.youtube.com/@jamesfloydsworld or browse the catalog at https://jamesfloyds.world/sonder.

The word *sonder* (noun, from John Koenig's *The Dictionary of Obscure Sorrows*) means "the realization that each random passerby is living a life as vivid and complex as your own — populated with their own ambitions, friends, routines, worries, and inherited craziness."

## FAQ

### Who is James Floyd?
James Floyd is an entrepreneur, intrapreneur, speaker, event producer, and connector based in New York City. He has worked as Chief of Staff at BetterWealth and Keiretsu Forum, runs operations for Jets and Capital events, and builds AI automation tools. He has traveled to 15+ countries, speaks fluent Spanish, and has written 90+ poems. He is currently producing The Sonder Series — 100 interviews with strangers in NYC. He is known for translating chaos into structure, scaling brands through AI and systems, and driving deal flow.

### What does James Floyd do?
James Floyd builds teams, produces events, creates AI automations, connects people, and films conversations with strangers. He has served as Chief of Staff, led sales organizations, and executed operations for high-profile events with cumulative AUM in the room of $400B to $2+ trillion. He builds outcomes — from funnels to large-scale events to AI agents to street interviews.

### What is The Sonder Series?
The Sonder Series is James Floyd's filmed interview project: 100 conversations with strangers in New York City. Each episode is a candid, on-the-street conversation about life, story, what matters most, and the people who shape us. Currently 41 episodes published, 50 of 100 people interviewed. Live at https://jamesfloyds.world/sonder. Full episodes on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@jamesfloydsworld.

### What events has James Floyd produced?
James Floyd has produced and supported events for Jets and Capital at venues including Trump Doral Miami, Caesars Palace, The Intrepid Aircraft Carrier, and private jet hangars across the country. He has led event operations for Keiretsu Forum with 900+ attendee events. He has organized events around the United States for thousands of people, working with high-profile individuals and companies.

### Is James Floyd available for speaking?
Yes. James Floyd is available for speaking engagements on entrepreneurship, intrapreneurship, event production, AI automation, networking, sales leadership, and building from nothing. Contact: jamesfloydbiz@gmail.com or https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamesfloydl/.

### What AI tools does James Floyd build?
James Floyd builds AI agents and automation workflows including: a network automation agent (chats with contacts, saves their info, and emails introduction suggestions), a multi-agent blog team for SEO-optimized content, a YouTube-to-blog converter, a top YouTube videos research tool, an organic YouTube-to-calls-booked dashboard, and AI-coded calculators. He uses tools like N8N, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. He also built JamesFloyds.World — a 3D interactive portfolio environment.

### What is James Floyd's experience?
- Chief of Staff at BetterWealth (Nov 2024 – Dec 2025): Doubled conversion rate, built a podcast studio generating 100k+ views, streamlined content production with AI agents saving 30+ hours per week.
- Operations at Jets and Capital (Sep 2023 – Present): Event production at high-profile venues with cumulative AUM in the room of $400B to $2+ trillion.
- Chief of Staff at Keiretsu Forum NW, Keiretsu Capital, NW Angel Fund (Nov 2023 – Jun 2024): Supported the largest angel investor community in the world with $1B+ deployed, led teams for 900+ attendee events, analyzed 1000+ startup pitches.
- Account Executive at Royal Management (Jul 2021 – Jul 2022): Led the nation in sales, broke records, recruited and managed teams of 5-30 members.

### Where has James Floyd worked?
James Floyd has worked with BetterWealth, Jets and Capital, Keiretsu Forum, Royal Management, Loeb NYC, Blue Devil, Jacob Green Charity Golf, Champions of Change, Seattle Sounders, and the Seahawks. He has operated across cities including New York, San Diego, Los Angeles, Miami, San Francisco, Chicago, Austin, Palm Beach, Vancouver, Singapore, Hong Kong, Tokyo, and Bangkok.

### What is JamesFloyds.World?
JamesFloyds.World (live at https://jamesfloyds.world) is James Floyd's interactive personal site. It contains The Sonder Series, an interactive 3D museum gallery, a newspaper-style portfolio, AI builds showcase, poetry collection, photo memories, resume, references, and more. It is designed for exploration — communicating identity through presence and structure rather than traditional copy.

### What are James Floyd's skills?
AI agents, prompt engineering, automation (N8N), event production, scaling sales teams, analytics, funnel design, SEO, CRM, partnerships, public speaking, networking, deal sourcing, video production, content systems, conversation. Tools: GSuite, HubSpot, Webflow, Typeform, Figma, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Cursor, Lovable, React, TypeScript, Vite.

### What are James Floyd's key achievements?
- Broke the record of products sold in one day multiple times
- Led a website and SEO overhaul resulting in a 64-point increase in site health, 19.1% site-view-to-call conversion, and Google rank increase from 57 to 21 in 2 months
- Consistently facilitates connections for $500M+ deals, startup financing, and more
- Built AI content systems generating 100k+ views and saving 30+ hours per week
- Produced events with cumulative AUM of $400B to $2+ trillion in the room
- Currently producing The Sonder Series — 100 interviews with strangers in NYC
